Package org.areslib.command

Interface Subsystem

All Known Subinterfaces:
AresDrivetrain
All Known Implementing Classes:
AresOperatorInterface, AresVisionSubsystem, DifferentialDriveSubsystem, MecanumDriveSubsystem, RobotHealthTracker, SimpleIntakeSubsystem, SubsystemBase, SwerveDriveSubsystem
public interface Subsystem
A robot subsystem. Subsystems are the basic building blocks of the command-based framework; they encapsulate hardware devices and provide methods for commands to interact with them.

Subsystems must be registered with the CommandScheduler for their periodic() method to be called. In simulation mode, simulationPeriodic() is also called each tick.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    periodic()
    This method is called periodically by the CommandScheduler.
    default void
    simulationPeriodic()
    This method is called periodically by the CommandScheduler.

  • Method Details

    • periodic

      default void periodic()
      This method is called periodically by the CommandScheduler. Useful for updating subsystem-specific state that you don't want to defer to a Command.

    • simulationPeriodic

      default void simulationPeriodic()
      This method is called periodically by the CommandScheduler. Useful for updating simulation-specific state that you don't want to defer to a Command.
